title: Formation of new district in the State of Goa – Assignment of Lead Bank Responsibility
text:
Formation of new district in the State of Goa – Assignment of Lead Bank Responsibility
RBI/2025-26/264
FIDD.CO.LBS.BC.No.14/02.08.001/2025-26
March 30, 2026
The Chairman / Managing Director & Chief Executive Officer
Lead Banks Concerned
Madam/ Dear Sir,
Formation of new district in the State of Goa –
Assignment of Lead Bank Responsibility
The Government of Goa has notified formation of new district, viz., Kushavati in the state of Goa vide Gazette Notification No. 16/29/1/2023-Rev-I/3259 dated December 31, 2025. Accordingly, it has been decided to designate the Lead Bank of the new district as below:
Sr
No
Newly Created District
Lead Bank Responsibility assigned to
District Working Code allotted to new district
1
Kushavati
State Bank of India
02W
(to be read as ‘Numeral Zero, Numeral Two and Alphabet W’)
2. There is no change in the Lead Banks of the other districts in the state of Goa.
Yours faithfully,
(Nisha Nambiar)
Chief General Manager-in-Charge
